title: Bison Gear Premium Bungee Cords with Hooks - UV Resistant Heavy Duty Cords with Non-Scratch Hooks, Including Mini Cords, Tarp Clips and Bungee Ties, Multi Use (28 Piece Set)
features: ▶RELIABILITY: With a robust 185lb/80kg break strength and constructed with high-quality materials for long-lasting durability ensuring a secure and reliable hold.
▶ ENHANCED DESIGN: Equipped with a sturdy 4mm inner steel core hook coated with a hard plastic ensuring no scratches or damage to anchor points.
▶ MULTIPURPOSE USE: Compact and lightweight our Bison Gear bungee cords are ideal for securing items quick and hassle-free providing a versatile solution for everyday use.

▶ VERSATILE & CONVENIENT: Available in various lengths to suit different tying needs, from securing small items to bundling larger loads. A reliable and flexible solution for a wide range of applications.
▶ LIFETIME WARRANTY: Our products are supported by a lifetime warranty, ensuring you unparalleled peace of mind and confidence in the durability and quality of our products.
description: 24 piece Bungee Cord set with . Industrial Grade Cord* and Tarp ties by BISON GEAR - The 4mm steel core hooks are plastic coated to protect anchor points - The cords are made of a latex and rubber blend making them 2 x Stronger than rubber alone - These durable bungee cord tie downs are.International Safety Standards Certified and come with a 100% guarantee - Don't Compromise on Quality or Safety! Pack Includes: - 6 x 18 Inch Cords - 4 x 24 Inch Cords - 2 x 32 Inch Cords - 2 x 40 Inch Cords - 6 x Mini Cords - 4 x Tarp Ties - 4 x Tarp Clips . Double strength bungie cords with coated 4mm steel core hooks - Tired of hooks on inferior products breaking? - Can't secure items safely due to lack of bungie cord expansion? - Frustrated with cheap hooks slipping from ; and damaging anchor points? - Worried about weathered and fatigued cords been at risk of breaking while in use? Not With BISON GEAR's Heavy Duty Bungie Cords Engineered to Last and Perform With over 20 years of quality manufacturing , these bungee cords meet the demands of rigorous and heavy duty use - Our hooks are made of metal and are coated in hard bond plastic to protect anchor point surfaces - The compound formula of latex and rubber increases strength and expansion ability - PP Binding with double strength UV coating protects the cords from degenerating in the elements and thus reduces cord fatigue - Fixed hooks ensure the integrity of the anchor and reduces the dangers associated with hooks detaching while in use Buy with confidence - No Risk To You - 100% Money Back Guarantee Thank you for taking the time to learn more about our products - we look forward to serving you. *We have proudly invested in the GS Certification of our Bungy Cords, a benchmark in industrial & military supply chains.
